response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior IC with broad full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (CI, test frameworks, GitLab/Docker infrastructure, custom test runner in D), but the role requires a people-management track record (2+ years managing people, 3+ years technical leadership) and mobile-platform experience supporting developer productivity at scale. The resume shows no formal people-management or direct-reports experience, no engineering manager titles, and only incidental mobile work (iOS/Apple TV at WatchUp ~2015). Workshop instruction and founding an open-source project demonstrate leadership traits but do not substitute for managing engineers.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and testing background (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, Selenium course, CI/CD setup)
8+ years of software engineering across diverse stacks with hands-on coding depth
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing via workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: No evidence of formal people-management or direct-report responsibility
Mobile-platform experience is minimal and dated (~2015-2016)
Career trajectory is IC/Staff-level, not management — no EM or team-lead titles

key_factors.factor: Strong developer-tools and testing infrastructure background
